headline: Truist Cuts Medtronic (MDT) Price Target, Sees Stable Q1 Performance
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is included among the 10 Healthcare Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 15, Truist analyst Richard Newitter lowered the firm’s price target on Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) to $95 from $103 and kept a Hold rating on the shares. The update came as part of a broader Q1 preview for MedTech.The analyst said […]

headline: ISRG's Rising Procedure TAM With Low Penetration Backs Sustained Growth
summary: ISRG expects its addressable procedures to reach 9 million by 2026, pointing to a significant growth runway as robotic surgery adoption remains nascent.

headline: China Diabetes Devices Market Forecast and Company Analysis Report 2026-2034 Featuring Roche, Abbott Laboratories, Novo Nordisk, BD, Medtronic, Eli Lilly, and Sanofi
summary: The China Diabetes Devices Market is projected to grow from USD 7.19 billion in 2025 to USD 14.51 billion by 2034, marking a CAGR of 8.11% from 2026 to 2034. This growth is driven by a surge in diabetes prevalence, enhanced healthcare infrastructure, and the adoption of advanced glucose monitoring and insulin devices. The market includes products such as blood glucose monitors, CGM devices, and insulin pens, crucial for managing blood sugar and preventing complications. Government healthcare ref

headline: How Investors May Respond To GEHC’s bkActiv Integration With Medtronic’s Stealth AXiS Navigation System
summary: GE HealthCare announced that its bkActiv intraoperative ultrasound system is now digitally integrated with Medtronic’s FDA-cleared Stealth AXiS surgical navigation platform, offering real-time imaging during cranial procedures and set to be showcased at the May 2026 AANS Annual Scientific Meeting. This integration could make bkActiv a more seamless “plug-and-play” option for neurosurgeons, potentially deepening GE HealthCare’s role in advanced surgical imaging workflows. Next, we’ll assess...
